turns.assistantContent: I have full context. Now I'll write the test file. The `discoverSkills()` function scans `{root}/skills/` which contains only `_deprecated_hive/`, `registry-internal.yaml`, and `skills/` — no direct SKILL.md files. The actual skills live at `.opencode/skills/` (15 skills) and `skills/skills/` (19 skills).
